name: Smooth Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and cut into quarters without peeling.
2. Remove the cores and chop the quarters into chunks.
3. Place in a saucepan with 1/4 cup water.
4. Cook until tender, similar to Chunky Applesauce preparation.
5. Force through a sieve or food mill's fine disc.
6. Season with the spices.
7. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
{Calories per portion: 87}
SOURCE: Slim Snacks (pg. 83)
